name: California ALW County Availability Tracker 2026
description: Participating Assisted Living Waiver (Medi-Cal HCBS) facilities and licensed participant-enrollment-unit (PEU) capacity for every California county where the waiver operates, plus the statewide enrollment and waitlist figures published by DHCS. The Assisted Living Waiver operates in 15 of California's 58 counties. DHCS publishes enrollment and waitlist only at the statewide level; per-county facility counts and capacity are derived from the DHCS GIS participating-facilities dataset.
creator: California Care Compass

sources.publisher: California Department of Health Care Services
sources.title: Assisted Living Waiver participating facilities (GIS dataset)

sources.publisher: California Department of Health Care Services
sources.title: Assisted Living Waiver enrollment and waitlist dashboard

sources.publisher: California Department of Health Care Services
sources.title: PACE application pause, Policy Letter 25-002 (effective 2025-11-20)

statewide.note: DHCS publishes enrollment and waitlist as a single statewide figure on its monthly ALW dashboard, not by county.
